title: Procris sonneratii
intro: Procris sonneratii, also known as Sonneratia, is a plant species belonging to the family Lythraceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine and folk remedies to treat various health issues, including fever, respiratory infections, and skin disorders, due to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Procris sonneratii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Herbal preparations made with Procris sonneratii include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
